_rationale: Iter-19: divergence resolved. C++ no-mode get_context is now id-only, matching Go. The latent name= and file_id+line resolution branches in handle_get_context (src/mcp/handlers_core.cpp, predating iter-9 / initial commit 9ce02a7) have been removed — Go's handleGetContext (internal/mcp/handlers.go) builds objectIDs solely from args.ID and never resolves args.Name in the default path. For invocation get_context name=Add on the multi-lang corpus both binaries now return {"contexts":[],"count":0}. result.content[].text moved back from the ignore tier to stable: the C++/Go divergence on the name= lookup path is closed (iter-18 had moved it to ignore as interim mitigation). Golden {"contexts":[],"count":0} was always correct and is untouched. find_symbols_by_name / get_symbol_at_line remain shared infra used by other handlers — only the no-mode get_context call sites were removed.

tiers._rationale_stable: Full envelope + body parity. result.content[].text restored to stable iter-19 — C++ no-mode get_context aligned with Go's id-only contract, both binaries emit {"contexts":[],"count":0} for name=Add.
tiers._rationale_ignore: Standard JSON-RPC envelope noise plus timing residue. result.content[].text is now stable — divergence resolved iter-19.
